items.title: A global workspace in language models
items.title_zh: Anthropic 发现语言模型中的全局工作空间
items.title_en: Anthropic discovers global workspace in language models
items.summary: Anthropic's research identifies a shared reasoning subspace in language models akin to a global workspace.

items.title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
items.title_zh: OpenWrt One：开源硬件路由器发布
items.title_en: OpenWrt One: Open Hardware Router Released
items.summary: OpenWrt releases an open hardware router, the OpenWrt One, with community praise and ongoing development for WiFi 7 version.

items.title: GLM 5.2 and the coming AI margin collapse
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2与即将到来的人工智能利润崩溃
items.title_en: GLM 5.2 and the Coming AI Margin Collapse
items.summary: An opinion piece arguing that the release of GLM 5.2 may trigger a margin collapse in AI, sparking a rich discussion on the economics of AI models.

items.title: Resetting Xbox
items.title_zh: 微软重置Xbox战略引发讨论
items.title_en: Microsoft Resets Xbox Strategy After Poor Profitability
items.summary: Microsoft's Xbox reset announcement triggers a community debate about the company's gaming strategy, profitability, and cultural challenges in game development.

items.title: tencent/Hy3
items.title_zh: 腾讯发布 Hy3：295B MoE 模型，21B 激活参数，Apache 2.0
items.title_en: Tencent releases Hy3: 295B MoE model, 21B active, Apache 2.0
items.summary: Tencent released Hy3, a 295B-parameter MoE model with 21B active parameters, outperforming similar-size models and available under Apache 2.0.

items.title: TRACE: open-source hierarchical memory for LLM agents, 82.5% on MemoryAgentBench’s EventQA using gpt-oss-20B [P]
items.title_zh: TRACE：开源层级记忆系统助力LLM代理在EventQA上达到82.5%
items.title_en: TRACE: Open-source hierarchical memory boosts LLM agents to 82.5% on EventQA
items.summary: Introduces TRACE, an open-source hierarchical memory system for LLM agents that achieves 82.5% on EventQA using gpt-oss-20B, outperforming Mem0 and MemGPT.

items.title: B站向 BiliRoaming 发律师函，要求停止逆向并删除代码
items.title_zh: B站向开源项目BiliRoaming发送律师函
items.title_en: Bilibili Sends Legal Letter to BiliRoaming Open-Source Project
items.summary: Bilibili sends a legal letter to the BiliRoaming project, demanding removal of code that bypasses regional restrictions and reverse-engineers its API.

items.title: 中国正在论证构建小行星防御系统
items.title_zh: 中国计划建造小行星防御系统
items.summary: China announces plans to develop an asteroid defense system with ground and space-based monitoring and kinetic/gravity mitigation methods.

items.title: 🤖 马斯克宣布 xAI 解散，将以 SpaceXAI 品牌并入 SpaceX
items.title_zh: 马斯克解散 xAI，以 SpaceXAI 品牌并入 SpaceX
items.title_en: Elon Musk Dissolves xAI, Rebrands as SpaceXAI Under SpaceX
items.summary: Elon Musk announced that xAI will dissolve and rebrand as SpaceXAI, integrating into SpaceX.
